content.en:
In the first battle, dozens of domain ancestors were wiped out.

Around, the onlookers were dumbfounded.

And the Divine Heaven Realm also came to a small number of domain ancestors, who were hidden in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm.

The Tianrui Domain Ancestor and Ye Tian were fighting, and they were naturally secretly watching the battle.

They originally thought that the Tianrui Domain Ancestor would be able to destroy the human world and kill the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors.

But he never expected that Ye Tian would easily destroy the Tianrui Domain Ancestors and them, showing their invincible combat power.

"It's terrifying, how could such a demonic realm of the Dao Mountain Realm be born?"

A Divine Heaven Realm Domain Ancestor trembled.

Originally, he also wanted to rely on the strength of his domain ancestor to show off his might in the Xuanxu Taboo Realm, but now that he has witnessed Ye Tian's strength, he suddenly lost this thought, and he was instantly cowardly.

Distance.

The Black Wind Mountain Lord, the Black Mountain Mountain Lord, and the Wind Mountain Lord were also dumbfounded, their strength was far inferior to the Tianrui Domain Ancestor.

Although the Tianrui Domain Ancestor is not the top Domain Ancestor of the top ten dominant levels of the Divine Heaven Realm, his strength can definitely send people to the top twenty.

On the bright side, the top domain ancestors of the Divine Heaven Realm are only fifty or sixty now, and ranking in the top twenty is not weak.

But such a powerful Tianrui Domain Ancestor was killed by Ye Tian in one move.

What a terrifying strength is this?

"Underestimate him!"

The Black Wind Mountain Lord Secret Path.

He originally thought that Ye Tian was sure to resist the top domain ancestor, relying on some kind of secret treasure given by the battle gate.

But now it seems that this is fundamentally relying on its own strength!

Wow!

After Ye Tian put away these treasures of the dead domain ancestors, he turned around and returned to the human realm.

And in the following days, the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm was very calm, and no one made trouble.

Even if the domain ancestors of the Divine Heaven Realm continued to arrive, they didn't dare to cause trouble.

Even the arrival of a top domain ancestor did not provoke Ye Tian.

For example, the Shijing Domain Ancestor in the mouth of the Six Extremes Domain Ancestor learned that Ye Tian had killed the Six Extremes Domain Ancestor, although he was angry, he didn't say anything.

Because he already knew that the Tianrui Domain Ancestor died in Ye Tian's hands, and he was killed in seconds with one move, without any power to resist.

He thought that his strength was stronger than that of Tianrui Domain Ancestor, but his strength was also very limited, how could he dare to provoke Ye Tian, wouldn't that be looking for death?

-----------------

In the blink of an eye, another million years have passed.

Many domain ancestors of the Divine Heaven Realm came to the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, and used the Forbidden Realm as coordinates to contact the people on the other side of the Divine Heaven Realm.

Therefore, at most, in tens of millions of years, there will definitely be a very terrifying number of Divine Heaven Realm powerhouses who will reach the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm.

For the domain ancestors and Dao ancestors of the Divine Heaven Realm, Ye Tian didn't care, and let them be in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm.

And these domain ancestors have gradually settled in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, establishing sect forces here, recruiting disciples, and growing their power.

Apparently, they made it their home in the future.

As for the Divine Heaven Realm, it was impossible for them to go back.

Of course, the goal of those top domain ancestors was very clear, that is, mysterious treasures.

And the Heavenly Emperor Palace was monitored by them layer by layer, but it was a pity that they couldn't find the Vast Sea Ancestor, otherwise they would have rushed into the Heavenly Emperor Palace a long time ago.

this day.

Ye Tian's Eternal Immortal Holy Body has made a breakthrough, it was the late stage of Dacheng realm before, and now it has reached the peak realm of Dacheng, and it is only one step away from breaking through to the consummation level of the Holy Body.

The Holy Body broke through, and Ye Tian's strength also improved a little.

It's a pity that the progress of the Holy Technique is average, and he can only make a small step of progress in the Dacheng realm, and as for wanting to impact the consummation realm, it is far away.

"The Space Holy Technique Void Slash still hasn't sensed the Void Holy Tree, it seems that it will take some years before the Void Holy Fruit matures, keep waiting!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Ye Tian knew where the Vast Sea Ancestor was, so he was not in a hurry, but the other top Domain Ancestors were in a hurry.

On this day, a group of top domain ancestors who had arrived in the Divine Heaven Realm contacted each other and started a meeting.

This meeting was chaired by five top domain ancestors.

These five top domain ancestors are not ordinary, they are much stronger than the Tianrui domain ancestors, and they are the five masters of the Divine Heaven Realm.

They are the Red Dragon Domain Ancestor, the Ten Thousand Blades Domain Ancestor, the Arctic Domain Ancestor, the Heavenly Demon Domain Ancestor, and the Shakya Domain Ancestor.

The status of these five domain ancestors was much higher than that of ordinary domain ancestors, so they were qualified to preside over such a meeting.

At the beginning of the meeting, the Red Dragon Domain Ancestor spoke: "The Vast Sea Ancestor is confirmed to be not in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, but now that I have been looking for so long, I haven't found the Vast Sea Ancestor, so I can't continue to wait, otherwise there will be a change, and it will not be good." I suggest that you directly threaten the half-step domain ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, let them tell the whereabouts of the vast sea ancestors, and kill them if they don't say anything!"

"In this case, wouldn't the Haohai Ancestor not come out at all? I propose to capture the people of the Heavenly Emperor's Palace, interrogate the whereabouts of the Haohai Ancestor, and if you really can't ask, threaten the Haohai Ancestor to come out. The Arctic Domain Ancestor proposed.

"What if the Mighty Sea Ancestor still doesn't come out, then what should I do?"

The Heavenly Demon Domain Ancestor asked.

"Then destroy the Heavenly Emperor Palace!"

Shakya Domain Ancestor said coldly.

After some discussion, this group of domain ancestors was finally ready to attack the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

In the past, no matter how much the Haohai Sea Ancestor escaped, he was under their surveillance.

But now, the vast sea ancestor has escaped from the surveillance, and he can't even deduce it, how can this be done?

So, they have to get their hands dirty!

Moreover, with their strength, they could easily sweep through the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

......

this day.

Outside the Heavenly Emperor's Palace, a domain ancestor descended.

At this time, the expressions of the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord changed greatly, and they even became panicked.

Before, although Ye Tian had broken through the Heavenly Emperor Palace, he had not killed any of them.

But this group of domain ancestors is different, they won't be merciful!

At the beginning, they casually sent a few elite domain ancestors to shatter the vast sea realm.

Now, they have come to the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and this posture is very unkind at first glance.

In the face of this group of domain ancestors, the Heavenly Emperor Palace couldn't be saved.

"Run!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the others opened a large array, enveloping this area of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

These large arrays were of no use, the purpose was just to block these domain ancestors.

Then, a large number of half-step domain ancestors tore through the void and left, and a few were able to escape.

Their destination is the Warring Tower, and as long as they escape into the Warring Tower, they will be safe.

As for those weak members of the Heaven and Earth Palace, they couldn't protect them.

However, the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord had sent a group of elites out of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm earlier, hiding in a hidden branch in the Daoshan Realm, so that the Heavenly Emperor Palace would not collapse.

As for the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master, they are not stupid, their main bodies have already entered the Battle Realm Tower, and they have not been able to come out of the War Realm Tower.

This is all since Ye Tian broke through the Heavenly Emperor Palace, they changed their strategy, and they didn't even notify the Haohai Sea Ancestor, and they directly decided to do so.

Therefore, the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master who remained in the Heavenly Emperor Palace were just incarnations.
